title: Record usage events for billing
description: Record usage events to track customer consumption for usage-based billing.

steps.title: Set up meter and customer
steps.description: Create a meter to track usage and a customer to track usage for.

nodes.title: Create a meter
nodes.description: Create a meter to define what usage events to track.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create customer
nodes.description: Create a new customer to associate with the payment or subscription.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Record usage event
steps.description: Record a usage event for the customer.

nodes.title: Record usage event
nodes.description: Send a meter event to record usage for this customer. This will be included in their next invoice.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.
